title: [Codex Improvement] Address skill density spikes with structural guardrails
body:
<!-- codex-improvement:skill-density-spike -->
Run: 2026-03-04-PM

## Delivery Contract
- Owner: codex
- Due: 2026-03-07 UTC (3 day target)
- Priority: medium

## Trigger
Skill density spikes detected in: firestore, schedulingLogic, metadataConfig, automation

## Why This Matters
Category-level spikes indicate recurring friction requiring stronger policy guardrails.

## Suggested Action
Add structural constraints for affected skill areas and monitor for 2-3 runs.

## Evidence
- firestore: 75 (prev 45)
- schedulingLogic: 56 (prev 37)
- metadataConfig: 40 (prev 19)
- automation: 145 (prev 93)

## Safety
- No direct push to main
- PR-only remediation
